title: Civil Aviation (Designated Provincial and Strategic Airports) Regulations, 2025

sections.heading: These Regulations may be cited as the Civil Aviation
sections.text:
These Regulations may be cited as the Civil Aviation
Title
(Designated Provincial and Strategic Airports} Regulations, 2025.

sections.heading: The airports set out in PartA of the Schedule are designated

sections.heading: The airports set out in Part B of the Schedule are designated Strategic
sections.text:
